title: CISA and USCG Identify Areas for Cyber Hygiene Improvement After Conducting Proa

rules.sigma:
title: CDB APEX v37.0 — CISA and USCG Identify Areas for Cyber Hygiene Improvement A
status: experimental
author: CyberDudeBivash SENTINEL APEX
date: 2026/03/22
logsource:
    category: firewall
detection:
    selection_dns:
        query:
            - '*machine.config*'
            - '*mail.cisa.dhs.gov*'
            - '*uscg.mil*'
            - '*web.config*'
    condition: selection_dns
level: high
